style: flat 2D vector cartoon, soft rounded shapes, clean bold outlines, warm cheerful color palette, gentle soft lighting, wholesome Islamic children's storybook illustration, expressive friendly faces, simple uncluttered background, high quality
negative: no text, no letters, no words, no caption, no watermark, no signature, no photorealism, no scary or dark themes, no violence, no gore, no clutter, not creepy

khalid.descriptor: Khalid is a cheerful 7-year-old Arab Muslim boy with short neat deep-black hair, large warm brown eyes, soft wheat skin, wearing an elegant black thobe with luminous gold floral and geometric embroidery on collar, cuffs and hem, and an olive-and-gold geometric kufi cap

noor.descriptor: Noor is a sweet 5-year-old Arab Muslim girl with big innocent eyes, rosy cheeks, a small soft-blue headscarf and a light-blue dress

teta.descriptor: Teta is a kind elderly grandmother with warm caring eyes, thin glasses, a cream hijab, cozy olive-and-maroon clothes and a gentle wise smile

lantern.descriptor: an ornate antique Arabian brass-and-gold lantern (fanous) with intricate Islamic geometric patterns, emitting a warm magical golden glow

cover_prompt: Warm storybook cover illustration: a cheerful 7-year-old Arab Muslim boy (black thobe with gold embroidery, olive-gold kufi cap), a sweet little girl in a light-blue headscarf and dress, and a kind smiling grandmother in a cream hijab, gathered together in a sunny garden around an ornate glowing golden Arabian lantern that radiates warm magical light, a small friendly cat nearby
endcard_prompt: A single ornate antique Arabian brass-and-gold lantern (fanous) with intricate Islamic geometric patterns glowing with a warm magical golden light, floating gently in a soft cozy dark-blue night background with tiny sparkles, peaceful and heartwarming
